hero.title: Mission, history, leadership, and safeguarding
hero.lede: Use this page to explain the parish mission, its dedication or patron, its history, and key leadership information.

intro.title: A calm, readable overview of the parish
intro.body: This page works best when the copy is clear, warm, and concise, with links to any key parish documents.
intro.imageAlt: Placeholder image for patron saint or parish dedication.
intro.caption: Replace with artwork, a statue, stained glass, or another image linked to the parish dedication.

cards.title: A simple statement of parish purpose
paragraphs: Use this card for a short explanation of prayer, sacramental life, welcome, formation, charity, and community service.
A short mission summary is usually more effective than a long block of text.

cards.title: The parish dedication
paragraphs: Replace this text with the story of your patron saint, dedication, or the reason the parish carries its current name.
This section can also explain any symbols used in the parish visual identity.

cards.title: Parish history
paragraphs: Use this section for the founding of the parish, key dates, school links, parish buildings, or a short timeline.

cards.title: Parish leadership
paragraphs: The renderer adds the priest and parish office contact details here automatically from the editable parish settings.

cards.title: Synod information and parish papers
paragraphs: Any documents uploaded to the document collection can be surfaced here automatically.

cards.title: Safeguarding links and contacts
paragraphs: This card can reinforce the safeguarding routes and invite people to use the dedicated safeguarding page.
